concerns.text: Plan T099 (Constitution Compliance Audit) has no corresponding task in tasks.md. tasks.md T099 implements Governance Invalidation instead. Constitution Principle I-VII compliance verification is a spec requirement (FR-030) without task coverage.

Plan T083 (Quickstart Runner Verification on default GitHub Actions runner) has no corresponding task in tasks.md. T048/T049 cover Quickstart documentation but not the explicit runner verification required by FR-028/SC-028.
Plan T044 (Power Analysis Calculation N≥300) has no corresponding task in tasks.md. T028 implements power analysis but uses different ID, breaking plan-to-task traceability for FR-025/SC-025.

Task ID descriptions mismatch between plan and tasks: Plan T044=Power Analysis vs tasks T044=Bias Adjustment; Plan T076=Input Checksums vs tasks T076=Output Checksums; Plan T077=Output Checksums vs tasks T077=Manifest Extension. Breaks ID-based traceability.
Tasks T096a, T096c, T097a, T097b, T099b, T100a, T100b, T100c reference coverage/constraint IDs (e.g., coverage-d467869d) that do not exist in spec.md or plan.md. Stale tags from older spec versions.

SC-001 (Extraction accuracy ≥95% on 100 summaries) has verification task T072, but T072 references 'real_world_labels.csv' which is created by T069c. No explicit task validates the ≥95% threshold is met (T070 validates ≥85% for SC-031b only).
